message: subprocess.run(command, shell=True) with HTTP request parameter 'command' and no authentication dependency. Unauthenticated OS command injection (RCE).
When OSTWIN_API_KEY=DEBUG all authentication checks are bypassed. X-User header can impersonate any identity.
CORSMiddleware configured with allow_origins=['*']. Combined with cookie auth enables cross-origin credential theft and drive-by exploitation.
POST /api/plans/create has no Depends(get_current_user). Unauthenticated attackers can write arbitrary files to ~/.ostwin/plans/.
Hardcoded fallback encryption key 'ostwin-default-insecure-key-32ch'. Any attacker with vault file access can decrypt all stored secrets.
Discord message.content flows unsanitized into Gemini generateContent prompt. Enables prompt injection, context exfiltration, and output hijacking.
GET /api/run_pytest_auth has no authentication and spawns pytest subprocess. Unauthenticated subprocess execution with stdout/stderr disclosure.
GET /api/test_ws has no authentication and spawns subprocess. Unauthenticated subprocess execution.
GET /api/telegram/config has no authentication. Exposes bot token and chat ID to unauthenticated callers.
POST /api/telegram/config has no authentication. Allows overwriting Telegram bot credentials.
POST /api/telegram/test has no authentication. Allows sending arbitrary Telegram messages.
Raw API key (_API_KEY) returned in JSON response body as access_token. Key exposed in browser devtools, proxy logs, and JavaScript memory.
DASHBOARD_URL read from process.env without scheme/host validation. Attacker-controlled env redirects all API calls (with X-API-Key) to arbitrary hosts (SSRF).
Session cookie set without secure=True. The API key cookie is transmitted in plaintext over HTTP connections.
WebSocket /api/ws has no authentication. Any client can connect and receive real-time agent event broadcasts.
POST /api/plans/{id}/status has no authentication. Unauthenticated plan status mutation.
POST /api/plans/refine has no authentication. Unauthenticated LLM prompt injection via refine endpoint.
GET /api/events SSE endpoint has no authentication. Internal agent events broadcast to unauthenticated clients.
POST /api/rooms/{id}/action has no authentication. Unauthenticated room state mutation (stop/pause/resume).
GET /api/fs/browse?path= passes user-supplied path to Path().expanduser().resolve() without base-directory bounds check. Directory traversal to any readable path.
User-supplied plan_id/room_id values flow into Path() construction across api_utils.py without sanitization. Multiple path traversal sinks.
room_id from HTTP path parameter flows into filesystem path construction. Path traversal risk in room directory resolution.
plan_id from HTTP path parameter flows into filesystem path construction without bounds validation.
User-supplied search query passed to re.match() without re.escape(). Enables regex injection and potential ReDoS.
Polynomial-time regular expression applied to user-provided value. Crafted input can cause catastrophic backtracking (DoS).
Polynomial-time regular expression applied to user-provided value. Crafted input can cause catastrophic backtracking (DoS).
Stack trace information flows to API response and may be exposed to external users. Leaks internal file paths and module structure.

Sensitive secret value logged via standard logging module. Log files may be accessible to unauthorized parties.
verify_password() always returns True regardless of input. Any future invocation will accept arbitrary passwords (dormant vulnerability).
